pages.raw_text:
A block of track was laid yesterday
on the new Spokane Traction COM
pany's line in Corbin Park under the
direction of Fl. L. Lilienthal. The
work will be rapidly pushed to the
river.


Jay p Graves of the CRANKY
smelter has returned from the east
where he placed the smelter stock
on the market. 1t now stands $475
to $5.25 a share. Mr.. Graves predicts
a dividend from this smelter early in
the summer


The Philharmonic quartet of Chi
cago appeared in the First Methodist
church last evening before a large
and appreciative audience. The pro-
gram consisted of solos. quartets,
duets and readings. There were re-
peated encores.


The finance committee of the city
council after yesterdays meeting at
which Police Chief Reddy, Commits
sioner Root and Chief Myers of the
fire department spoke, expressed
themselves in favor of higher wages
for firemen and policemen. No scale
has been as yet arranged.


April dividends from mines con-
trolled in Spokane will reach about
$4,000. The Kendall will pay s15,-
600. Trinity County Gold Mining COM
pany of California. $4,000; Standard
Mining company In the Occur
d. Alenea S25 900. Bunker Fiji and
Sullivan. $4,000: Empire State-Idahe
company. $4,000. and many others In
| greater or less amounts.
